message:
🐛 Fix Hardware Health card showing Refresh failed on load (#2776)

The hook used `enabled: !isAgentUnavailable()` which was evaluated
once at mount time — before the agent had connected. This made the
hook permanently disabled until the component re-rendered after
agent detection, causing "Refresh failed" for several seconds.

Removed the `enabled` gate. The fetcher handles unavailability by
throwing, which useCache properly tracks with consecutive failures
and backoff retry. The card now fetches immediately on mount and
succeeds as soon as the agent is reachable.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2338,7 +2338,9 @@ export function useCachedHardwareHealth(): CachedHookResult<HardwareHealthData>
     initialData: HW_INITIAL_DATA,
     demoData: HW_DEMO_DATA,
     persist: true,
-    enabled: !isAgentUnavailable(),
+    // Don't gate on isAgentUnavailable() — the agent may connect after the hook
+    // mounts and `enabled` is only read once. The fetcher handles unavailability
+    // internally by throwing, which useCache tracks as consecutive failures.
     fetcher: fetchHardwareHealth,
   })
